project.name: Module 13: Full-Page Manager
project.description: Create entrypoints/manager/ — a full-page bookmark manager in a browser tab. Reuses ALL shared components from Modules 10-12 (BookmarkTree, dialogs, settings) with a wider layout featuring sidebar folder navigation and main content panel. Eliminates the popup.js/manager.js duplication from Holy PB. Target: ManagerApp.tsx ≤200 lines, ManagerSidebar.tsx ≤150 lines.

preserve_verbatim: Full-page manager opens in a dedicated browser tab (chrome-extension://[id]/manager.html)
Manager provides same functionality as popup with expanded layout

falls_short.deficiency: Holy PB manager.js is 2,107 lines duplicating ~50% of popup.js
falls_short.hush_requires: Manager imports ALL shared components. Zero duplicated logic. ManagerApp.tsx is layout + routing only.

falls_short.deficiency: No sidebar — same vertical layout as popup
falls_short.hush_requires: Sidebar with folder tree navigation. Click folder → main panel shows contents.
Search bar using flattenTree → filter(isBookmark) → filter by query for instant bookmark search.

build_from_scratch: entrypoints/manager/index.html — full-page HTML shell. NO manifest.type meta tag (WXT registers as regular extension page, not browser_action).
entrypoints/manager/main.tsx — React root, calls initSentry() from @/lib/sentry (same pattern as popup/main.tsx)
entrypoints/manager/ManagerApp.tsx — sidebar + main content layout, own SessionContext + TreeContext (independent React root, same hooks)
components/manager/ManagerSidebar.tsx — folder tree (click to navigate), set picker, lock button. Manager-specific layout — not shared with popup.
components/manager/ManagerToolbar.tsx — search bar, add bookmark/folder buttons, settings link
components/manager/SearchResults.tsx — filtered bookmark list from search query (bookmarks only — folders excluded)
hooks/useSearch.ts — flattenTree → filter(isBookmark) → filter by query string → debounced 200ms → cleanup on unmount
Open manager via: chrome.tabs.create({ url: chrome.runtime.getURL('manager.html') })

user_stories.title: Manager entry point, layout, and shared component integration
user_stories.description: Create manager entry point (WXT auto-detects entrypoints/manager/). ManagerApp with sidebar layout. Reuse SessionContext/TreeContext pattern and all shared components. Auth screens shared with popup. Same HYBRID + wait-for-response pattern. REQUIRES Modules 9-12 complete.
steps: RED: Test: 'ManagerApp renders sidebar and main content panel'
RED: Test: 'ManagerApp shows LoginScreen when locked' (reuses popup LoginScreen)
RED: Test: 'ManagerApp shows bookmark tree in main panel when unlocked'
RED: Test: 'ManagerSidebar shows folder tree'
RED: Test: 'clicking folder in sidebar filters main panel to that folder contents'
RED: Test: 'ManagerSidebar shows set picker and lock button'
RED: Test: 'lock button sends LOCK message and returns to login'

GREEN: Create entrypoints/manager/index.html (NO manifest.type meta tag — WXT registers as regular extension page). Create main.tsx (React root + initSentry() from @/lib/sentry — same as popup). Create ManagerApp.tsx with sidebar layout (CSS grid or flex: sidebar 250px, main fluid). Import LoginScreen, SetupScreen from components/screens/. Import BookmarkTree, all dialogs from components/shared/. Create ManagerSidebar with folder-only tree (filter isFolder), click sets selectedFolderPath. Main panel shows BookmarkTree filtered to selected folder. Own SessionContext + TreeContext providers (same hooks, independent React root).
REFACTOR: Verify shared components render correctly in full-page context (no popup-specific dimensions hardcoded in shared components)
acceptance_criteria: Manager loads in browser tab via manager.html
manager index.html has NO manifest.type meta tag — WXT registers it as a regular extension page
manager main.tsx calls initSentry() from @/lib/sentry (same as popup/main.tsx — NOT constructing BrowserClient directly)
Sidebar (250px) + main panel (fluid) layout
Auth screens (LoginScreen, SetupScreen) reused — zero duplication
ManagerSidebar: folder tree, set picker, lock button
Clicking folder in sidebar shows that folder's contents in main panel
All shared components work in full-page manager context (no popup-specific dimension breakage)
Own SessionContext + TreeContext providers (same hooks, independent instances)
Same HYBRID + wait-for-response pattern as popup
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/manager/ && npx tsc --noEmit && npx wxt build

user_stories.title: Manager toolbar with search and action buttons
user_stories.description: Toolbar with search bar, add bookmark/folder buttons, settings navigation. Search uses flattenTree → filter(isBookmark) → filter by query for instant bookmark results. Folders excluded from search results. Debounced 200ms with cleanup on unmount.
steps: RED: Test: 'ManagerToolbar renders search input and action buttons'
RED: Test: 'search filters bookmarks by title and URL'
RED: Test: 'useSearch excludes folders from results'
RED: Test: 'search clears folder selection (shows all results)'
RED: Test: 'empty search restores folder view'
RED: Test: 'useSearch returns filtered results with debounce'
RED: Test: 'useSearch cleans up debounce timer on unmount'

GREEN: Create ManagerToolbar (shadcn Input + buttons). Create hooks/useSearch.ts: flattenTree(tree) → filter(isBookmark) → filter by query (case-insensitive match on title + url) → debounce 200ms. Return cleanup function for unmount. Create SearchResults (flat bookmark list using BookmarkItem). When search active, main panel shows SearchResults instead of BookmarkTree.
REFACTOR: Extract debounce to shared utility or use existing
acceptance_criteria: Search bar with debounced input (200ms)
Search filters by title and URL (case-insensitive) — bookmarks ONLY, folders excluded via isBookmark() filter
Flat list of matching bookmarks in search results
Active search overrides folder navigation
Clearing search restores folder view
Add bookmark/folder buttons open shared dialogs
useSearch cleans up debounce timer on unmount
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/manager/ tests/unit/hooks/useSearch.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Open Manager from popup, settings in manager, and E2E
user_stories.description: 'Open Manager' button in popup TreeScreen. Manager settings reuses SettingsScreen. E2E tests for full manager flows.
steps: RED: Playwright test: 'popup Open Manager button opens manager.html in new tab'
RED: Playwright test: 'manager login → tree → search → add bookmark → settings flow'
RED: Playwright test: 'manager sidebar folder navigation filters main panel'
GREEN: Add 'Open Manager' button to popup TreeScreen toolbar (chrome.tabs.create({ url: chrome.runtime.getURL('manager.html') })). Wire SettingsScreen into manager routing (reuse, not duplicate).
REFACTOR: Full verification: tsc + eslint + vitest + coverage + wxt build + test:e2e. Verify zero duplicated business logic between popup and manager.
acceptance_criteria: Popup has 'Open Manager' button → manager.html in new tab
Manager has settings accessible (reuses SettingsScreen)
E2E: full manager flow works (login → tree → search → settings)
E2E: sidebar folder navigation works
Zero duplicated logic between popup and manager
Zero regressions
user_stories.verification: npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint . && npx vitest run --coverage && npx wxt build && npm run test:e2e

what_exists.popup_complete: Full popup: LoginScreen, SetupScreen, TreeScreen, SettingsScreen with all sub-components. All shared components in components/shared/. All hooks in hooks/ at project root.
what_exists.shared_components: BookmarkTree, BookmarkItem, FolderItem, AddEditBookmarkDialog, AddFolderDialog, ConfirmDialog, FolderPicker, PasswordInput, SetPicker, MnemonicDisplay, ErrorBoundary, all settings sub-components in components/settings/.
what_exists.background: All 16 message handlers fully functional (Module 12 wired up the 10 stubs). Zero NOT_IMPLEMENTED remaining.
what_exists.manager_shell: entrypoints/manager/ may have index.html from Module 1 scaffold. Minimal or empty.
what_exists.css_note: Popup dimensions (380x550) applied at popup App.tsx level only. Shared components use relative/fluid sizing — verified in Module 11.

what_does_not_exist.manager_ui: No ManagerApp, ManagerSidebar, ManagerToolbar, SearchResults. No useSearch hook.
what_does_not_exist.manager_entry: entrypoints/manager/main.tsx does not exist (or minimal stub).

tech_stack.ui: React 19 + shadcn/ui. CSS grid or flexbox for sidebar layout.
forbidden_patterns: Hooks in lib/ (use hooks/ at root)
manifest.type meta tag in manager index.html

layout.description: Sidebar + main content. Sidebar: 250px fixed, full height. Main: fluid.
layout.sidebar: Folder tree (folders only). Set picker. Lock button. 'Open Settings' link.
layout.main_panel: Toolbar (search + actions) + BookmarkTree/SearchResults. Selected folder contents, or search results, or root.

context.component_reuse: The entire value of this module is reuse. ManagerApp ~150-200 lines of layout + routing. ManagerSidebar ~100-150 lines. Everything else imported from components/shared/ and components/screens/.

architecture.communication: Same HYBRID pattern as popup. Own SessionContext + TreeContext (independent React root, same hooks). Both popup and manager communicate with same background worker.
architecture.stale_state: If popup and manager are open simultaneously, one doesn't see the other's changes mid-session. Acceptable for v1.0. Future: chrome.runtime.onMessage listener for cross-window state change notifications.
architecture.manager_components: Manager-specific layout components live in components/manager/ — not shared with popup. Follows components/screens/ and components/shared/ precedent. Only ManagerSidebar, ManagerToolbar, SearchResults live here.
architecture.css_isolation: Popup constraints (380x550) applied at popup App.tsx level only. Shared components must use relative/fluid sizing. Manager's full-page layout means shared components stretch to fill available space.

read_first: entrypoints/popup/App.tsx (pattern to follow — after Module 10 completes)
lib/data-model.ts (flattenTree, isFolder, isBookmark for search and sidebar)

inputs.what_it_provides: useSession, useSendMessage, useTree (in hooks/ at root)

outputs.description: ≤200 lines. Layout + routing, all content from shared.
Search hook: flattenTree → filter(isBookmark) → filter by query → debounce 200ms → cleanup on unmount.

known_risks.action: WXT auto-detects entrypoints/manager/index.html. Verify. May need wxt.config.ts.
Each creates own providers via same hooks. Both talk to same background. Correct.

known_risks.issue: Stale state between popup and manager
known_risks.action: Both GET_STATE on mount. No cross-window refresh in v1.0. Acceptable.

known_risks.issue: Shared component CSS assumes popup dimensions
known_risks.action: Popup constraints applied at popup App.tsx level only. Shared components use relative/fluid sizing. Verify BookmarkTree, dialogs render correctly in full-page context.

known_risks.issue: Concurrent SAVE from popup and manager
known_risks.action: chrome.runtime.onMessage processes sequentially. Last-write-wins. Acceptable for v1.0.

known_risks.issue: manager index.html must not have manifest.type meta tag
known_risks.action: Popup has meta name='manifest.type' content='browser_action'. Manager must NOT — it's a regular extension page. WXT may handle this automatically; verify in built output.

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Verify WXT manager entry point. Focus on reuse — minimal new code. Test in wxt dev.
metadata.quality_gate: Manager loads. Sidebar works. Search filters bookmarks only (not folders). Zero duplicated logic. All ≤ 300 lines. useSearch cleans up on unmount.
metadata.human_review_required: Open popup and manager side by side. Same functionality, different layouts. Grep for duplicated business logic — expect zero. Verify shared components render at full-page width.

execution_rules.clarifying_questions: Encouraged. Key: WXT manager entry point, sidebar layout, search isBookmark filter, CSS isolation.
